# virtuacloud_systems (Data Source)

List all available operating systems for Virtua.Cloud servers.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `systems` (Attributes List) List of available systems. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--systems))

<a id="nestedatt--systems"></a>
### Nested Schema for `systems`

Read-Only:

- `category` (String) System category (e.g. minimal, windows, apps).
- `distribution` (String) Distribution name (e.g. debian, ubuntu, windows-server-2019).
- `is_windows` (String) Whether this is a Windows system (1=yes, 0=no).
- `name` (String) System display name.
- `uuid` (String) System UUID.
- `version` (String) Distribution version.
